title: pelargonium × wellsianum
intro: Pelargonium × wellsianum, also known as Rose Geranium or Cape Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the Geraniaceae family, known for its distinctive rose-like fragrance and attractive foliage. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, stress, and anxiety, due to its high content of essential oils, such as geraniol and linalool. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopause, among others. Rose Geranium is commonly used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used externally for skin and wound care, or internally as a dietary supplement.
